name: grammar-selector
author: lumine-code
description: Select the grammar to use for the current editor with `ctrl-shift-L`.

showOnRightSideOfStatusBar.title: Show On Right Side Of Status Bar
showOnRightSideOfStatusBar.description: Show the active pane item’s language on the right side of Lumine’s status bar, instead of the left.

hideDuplicateTextMateGrammars.title: Hide Duplicate Grammars
hideDuplicateTextMateGrammars.description: Hides non-preferred grammars when there is more than one grammar. When checked, whichever grammar is preferred for a given scope name (TextMate or Tree-sitter) will be the only one shown. When unchecked, all grammars will always be shown in the list, regardless of the user’s settings.
